summary: Tested billing cycle enforcement features. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Admin Subscriptions tab shows status counts, grace period accounts with Reactivate button. Recruiter dashboard correctly hides banners for active users.
critical_code_review_comments: Grace period banner correctly shows when subscription_status is 'past_due' with grace_days_remaining
Suspended banner correctly shows when subscription_status is 'inactive' AND tier_id is NOT 'free'
Admin subscription-overview endpoint returns proper status_counts, grace_period_accounts, and suspended_accounts
Admin reactivate endpoint creates audit log entry and extends subscription by 30 days
Payment webhook handles both initial payments (via m_payment_id) and recurring payments (via token)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Billing cycle enforcement features fully tested. Key findings: 1) Admin Subscriptions tab shows 4 Active, 0 Trial, 1 Grace Period (FinTech SA Test with 0 days remaining), 0 Suspended, 12 Free/No Plan, 12 Pending accounts. 2) Reactivate button is functional. 3) Recruiter hr@techcorp.co.za has 'pro' tier with 'active' status - no banners shown (correct behavior). 4) To test grace/suspended banners, would need to set an account to past_due or inactive status.

backend.admin_reactivate_endpoint: PASSED - Endpoint exists and responds correctly
backend.auth_me_subscription_status: PASSED - Returns subscription_status in account object
backend.auth_me_grace_days: PASSED - Would return grace_days_remaining when status is past_due
backend.payment_webhook_exists: PASSED - Accepts form data and returns status
backend.recruiter_account_fields: PASSED - Has all required billing fields

frontend.recruiter_dashboard_no_banner_active: PASSED - No grace/suspended banners for active user
frontend.my_listings_no_banner_active: PASSED - No grace/suspended banners for active user
frontend.admin_subscriptions_tab: PASSED - Tab exists with status count cards
frontend.admin_status_cards: PASSED - Shows Active, Trial, Grace Period, Suspended, Free, Pending
frontend.admin_grace_period_accounts: PASSED - Shows accounts with Reactivate button
